framework.name: Vague Trust Architecture Without Specifics
framework.description: PayPal references 'rigorous authentication mechanisms, tokenized identities, or simplified dispute resolution processes' but provides zero technical detail on revocation mechanisms, real-time kill switches, scope enforcement (merchant category codes, velocity limits), or how disputes work when agents go rogue.
framework.raw_quote: Whether through rigorous authentication mechanisms, tokenized identities, or simplified dispute resolution processes, PayPal strives to ensures AI agents are as secure and reliable as manual transactions.

source.title: Enabling Agentic Payments with PayPal: Pioneering the Future of ...
